question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not mention any chapters or specific sections of the thesis. It focuses entirely on the problem statement and the proposed solution.

question: Description
feedback: The text does not describe the contents of any thesis sections; it only describes the problem context and the objective of the prototype development.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis is not visible. The text is repetitive (the first paragraph and second paragraph repeat almost the same information) and lacks a roadmap of how the research is organized.
